18/Jul/23 12:12;cshah;As of now, with keeping single instance of Financialbridge we are not seeing any further issue. Hence this has been resolved. 

I have also gone through data for last few days and filtered data to separate out 8 campaigns which are affected. In the attached excel sheet I have provided campaign ID, plan ID and finance Order Id values for quick reference. 

For fixing this data on our end is pretty simple: for each campaign we can confirm which plan ID is correct value and then update records for given camapaign to use same PLAN ID. it's going to be a simple script fix on our end. 

As long as this solution works for client too, we can take care of this within an hour or so.;;;

column30:
[~cphuah]

Environment: Adazzle-EU

Affected Clients, DAN France, Havas France

We have accidentally made a database change in EU production which has affected all clients, as follows.

 
{code:java}
update CommissionRelationship
set enddate = '09 Dec 2020'
where bepublicationid is NULL{code}
 

We would like to revert this.

[~mspencer] advised as follows:

"Rolling back a committed transaction is not viable. (It's technically possible and there are some DBA tools that attempt to provide the functionality but it is very much a here-be-dragons kinda thing). My recommendation would be to do a DB restore to a support environment, bulk export the impacted table, bulk load it into a temporary table in production and then merge the dataset into the live table."

Nature of customer impact: The Plan media can't be converted without the fees so they are blocked
When we consult the commission, here an example : select * from commissionrelationship where agencylinkid =9430
